title: The Cherry Blossom Dream
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the cherry blossom dream, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Cherry Blossom Dream. Chopper learns what Hiriluk believes about medicine, hope, and the cherry blossom dream that can heal a country. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: With this flag, I shall fight on like a true pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: For a man with a pirate's flag behind his back, impos- sibility is an impos- sibility!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Yes, apparently there's some rare mushroom in this kingdom that can be used to prepare some sort of panacea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But how do I get there...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Did you... pick it for my sake...?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I want to become a doctor too...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So please live and teach me how to become one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that is, if it's possible for a reindeer to learn...

summary: This part highlights the cherry blossom dream and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
